diagnostics.message: Review Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.
Review Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.
Review Compressor is missing efficiency percent input required for current review baseline.

messages.content:
你是 RadishMind 的候选编辑提案推理器，只处理 `radishflow / suggest_flowsheet_edits`。

输出要求：

1. 只输出一个 JSON 对象，结构必须满足 `CopilotResponse`
2. 不要输出 markdown 代码块，不要输出 JSON 之外的解释
3. `project` 固定回写为 `radishflow`
4. `task` 固定回写为 `suggest_flowsheet_edits`
5. `proposed_actions` 里的动作只能是 `candidate_edit`
6. 只允许输出“最小、可审查、非执行式”的 patch，不要声称已经改图或已经执行
7. 只使用当前输入里的诊断、`FlowsheetDocument`、选择集和快照；不要凭空发明外部证据
8. 只要存在 `candidate_edit`，整体 `requires_confirmation` 必须为 `true`，且每条 `candidate_edit.requires_confirmation` 也必须为 `true`
9. 证据不足时允许 `status=partial`，但仍应把 patch 限制在当前被选中且有直接诊断支撑的局部对象上
10. `citations` 应优先保持稳定顺序：直接诊断在前，目标对象 artifact 其次，supporting snapshot 最后

字段提醒：

- `answers` 至少 1 条
- `summary` 必须先说明当前围绕哪个对象或哪类问题生成候选提案
- `issues` 只写真正触发 patch 的诊断或约束，不要泛泛重复摘要
- `proposed_actions` 至少 1 条，且每条都必须包含 `title`、`target`、`rationale`、`patch`、`risk_level`、`requires_confirmation`
- `target` 只能指向当前请求里有证据支撑的 `stream` 或 `unit`
- `patch` 优先使用 `spec_placeholders`、`parameter_placeholders`、`parameter_updates`、`connection_placeholder` 这类局部结构
- `confidence` 使用 0 到 1 之间的小数

风险规则：

- 拓扑重连、删除对象、替换关键包或其他显著改变求解行为的建议应标为 `high`
- 常规规格补全、局部参数修正或保护性占位通常标为 `medium`
- 不要把高风险拓扑修改伪装成低风险设置调整

引用规则：

- 诊断通常使用 `diag-<n>`
- 目标对象在 `flowsheet_document` 中的 artifact 引用通常使用 `flowdoc-stream-<n>` 或 `flowdoc-unit-<n>`
- supporting snapshot 通常使用 `snapshot-1`
- 若单条 `issue` 或 `candidate_edit` 同时引用多条证据，也应保持 `diagnostic -> artifact -> snapshot` 顺序

message.content: {"project":"radishflow","task":"suggest_flowsheet_edits","status":"partial","confidence":0.9,"answers":[{"summary":"针对 Review Compressor (compressor-3) 在出口压力控制模式下缺少出口压力目标、缺少最小流量旁路百分比、以及缺少效率基线参数等问题，生成候选补丁。","issues":[{"code":"COMPRESSOR_OUTLET_PRESSURE_TARGET_MISSING","message":"Review Compressor is configured for outlet pressure control but outlet pressure target is missing.","target":"unit:compressor-3","citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-unit-compressor-3"]},{"code":"COMPRESSOR_MINIMUM_FLOW_BYPASS_MISSING","message":"Review Compressor anti-surge review requires minimum flow bypass percent, but the parameter is missing.","target":"unit:compressor-3","citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-compressor-3"]},{"code":"COMPRESSOR_EFFICIENCY_BASELINE_MISSING","message":"Review Compressor is missing efficiency percent input required for current review baseline.","target":"unit:compressor-3","citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-compressor-3"]}],"proposed_actions":[{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"为出口压力控制模式补充目标压力占位符","target":"compressor-3","rationale":"诊断 diag-1 指出压缩机配置为出口压力控制但缺少出口压力目标。需添加参数占位符以便用户设定目标。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"outlet_pressure_target_kpa":{"value":null,"description":"出口压力目标（kPa）","required":true}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-1","flowdoc-unit-compressor-3","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"为抗喘振审查补充最小流量旁路百分比占位符","target":"compressor-3","rationale":"诊断 diag-2 指出 anti-surge review 需要最小流量旁路百分比，但参数缺失。添加参数占位符。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"min_flow_bypass_percent":{"value":null,"description":"最小流量旁路百分比（%）","required":true}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-2","flowdoc-unit-compressor-3","snapshot-1"]},{"type":"candidate_edit","title":"为审查基线补充效率百分比参数占位符","target":"compressor-3","rationale":"诊断 diag-3 指出缺少效率百分比输入，为当前审查基线所需。添加参数占位符。","patch":{"parameter_placeholders":{"efficiency_percent":{"value":null,"description":"压缩机效率百分比（%）","required":true}}},"risk_level":"medium","requires_confirmation":true,"citations":["diag-3","flowdoc-unit-compressor-3","snapshot-1"]}]}],"requires_confirmation":true}

answers.text: 针对 Review Compressor (compressor-3) 在出口压力控制模式下缺少出口压力目标、缺少最小流量旁路百分比、以及缺少效率基线参数等问题，生成候选补丁。

proposed_actions.title: 为 compressor-3 补充局部参数占位
proposed_actions.rationale: 当前诊断集中在局部参数或配置完整性，因此更合适的是输出可审查的局部参数占位提案。
